plans.name: The Outlaw
plans.description: A tightly efficient layout with premium finishes standard, not optional — no upgrades required to get what you want.

plans.name: The Hondo
plans.description: Room to spread out with the hot-button features today's buyers ask for most, built around everyday livability.

plans.name: The Rio Bravo
plans.description: The largest of the series — quality represented in both the plan and the day-to-day execution of every build.
